defs: The act of altering or making different.
quotes: Alteration, though it be from worse to better, hath in it incoveniences.

defs: The state of being altered; a change made in the form or nature of a thing; changed condition.
quotes: Ere long might perceive Strange alteration in me.
Appius Claudius admitted to the senate the sons of those who had been slaves; by which, and succeeding alterations, that council degenerated into a most corrupt.
